raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (center of table)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the darker box without colliding with the tabletop; there is sufficient lateral clearance around the box for two end-effectors to make side contact and generate lifting friction. The top of the box is unobstructed (no objects stacked on it).",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely clamped from both sides by the two end-effectors and lifted off the table, held stably in the air under dual-arm control."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the darker box without colliding with the tabletop; there is sufficient lateral clearance around the box for two end-effectors to make side contact and generate lifting friction. The top of the box is unobstructed (no objects stacked on it).
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely clamped from both sides by the two end-effectors and lifted off the table, held stably in the air under dual-arm control.
